raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current focus","name":"What's been most on your mind in the role lately, Ahmed?","description":"Safe opener that lets Ahmed set context before the conversation turns to growth specifics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Senior scope now","name":"Where does your work feel most like Head of Product work right now?","description":"Surfaces which parts of his current remit already operate at the next level.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role definition","name":"What does the next-level Head of Product role mean to you?","description":"Gets his own definition of strategic ownership and success before discussing gaps.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Future scope","name":"Where do you want your scope to be more strategic over the next year?","description":"Makes the aspiration concrete in terms of scope rather than abstract ambition.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust gaps","name":"Where does stakeholder trust feel thinnest for you today?","description":"Identifies the specific relationship surfaces that may be limiting influence.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility moments","name":"What situations make it hardest to show up with the level of visibility you want?","description":"Surfaces contexts that may be pulling him back into lower-visibility tactical mode.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegate more","name":"What are you still holding that someone else could own?","description":"Tests where he is still acting as an individual executor instead of leveraging the team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What would help you spend more time on strategic decisions than delivery details?","description":"Elicits what support or structure would let him shift toward higher-level work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next experiment","name":"What's one concrete shift you want to try before our next conversation?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment that turns the growth plan into action.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
